briefdescription.para: Get optimal tile sizes for current CPU.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *q_out, float *k_out, float *v_out, const float *input, const float *gamma, const float *W_qkv, const float *b_qkv, int hidden, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, float eps)
memberdef.name: mega_fuse_rmsnorm_qkv

briefdescription.para: Phase 1: Fused RMSNorm + QKV (intermediates in registers)

detaileddescription.para: Simpler step: Just fuse RMSNorm with QKV projection. Q/K/V stay in stack buffers, not DRAM.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *q_out, float *k_out, float *v_out, const float *input, const float *gamma, const float *W_qkv, const float *b_qkv, const float *rope_cos, const float *rope_sin, int pos, int hidden, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq, float eps)
memberdef.name: mega_fuse_rmsnorm_qkv_rope

detaileddescription.para: Q/K stay in output buffers, RoPE applied in-place.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *output, const float *input, const float *residual, const float *W_qkv, const float *b_qkv, const float *W_o, const float *b_o, float *kv_cache_k, float *kv_cache_v, const float *rope_cos, const float *rope_sin, int pos, int hidden, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq, float eps)
memberdef.name: mega_fused_attention_decode

briefdescription.para: Mega-fused attention for decode mode (single token)

detaileddescription.para: This is the "holy grail" - all operations fused, no intermediates to DRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Residual input [hidden] - read for residual add

memberdef.argsstring: (float *output, const float *input, const float *residual, const float *W_qkv, const float *W_o, float *kv_cache_k, float *kv_cache_v, const float *rope_cos, const float *rope_sin, int start_pos, int tokens, int total_kv_len, int hidden, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq, float eps)
memberdef.name: mega_fused_attention_prefill

briefdescription.para: Mega-fused attention for prefill mode (multiple tokens)

detaileddescription.para: Holy grail fusion: RMSNorm → QKV → RoPE → Flash Attention → OutProj
All intermediates stay in registers/L1/L2. Single DRAM round-trip.
Memory Reduction: Before: ~32KB intermediates per layer (stack/heap) After: ~8KB total (input + output only) Reduction: 4-5× per layer, ~100× for full model
Performance Target: Move from memory-bound to compute-bound Expected speedup: 5-10× for attention-heavy workloads
